ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The timestep of the experiment */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Logarithm of the standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* The original rewards received */,
  "rewards" REAL /* The rewards after adjustments or calculations */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* A descriptive name for the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who initiated the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* The name of the reinforcement learning model used */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* The name of the environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the parameters used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Array of observations made during the experiment */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution during the experiment */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Array of actions taken during the experiment */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The timestep at which the observation was made */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the episode to which the observation belongs */,
  "episode_timestep" INTEGER /* The timestep within the episode */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the observation was recorded */,
  "observation_metadata" TEXT /* A JSON object containing additional metadata about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Array of human observations regarding the experiment */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_metadata" TEXT /* A JSON object containing additional metadata about the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the episode started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the episode ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
